summary: Fixed the GitHub Actions problem matcher regex so property values containing colons (e.g. title=TypeError: x) no longer cause ::error lines to be silently dropped. Wired getParser into gate.mjs via --output-format flag so format-specific parsers are now reachable from production code. Added 3 new tests: colon-in-property-value, control-char stripping, and getParser round-trip (27 total tests, all passing).
